title: mentha × stachyoides var. scordiastrum
intro: Mentha × stachyoides var. scordiastrum, also known as Corsican mint or lemon mint, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the mint family and is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful for treating digestive issues, headaches, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Mentha × stachyoides var. scordiastrum include relieving nausea, reducing fever, and soothing digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be used in cooking and as a garnish for various dishes.
